sourcesContent:
# Optional-chaining call/index: `?.(` and `?.[` forms, chained
# and composed; optional-assignment targets lower to guarded forms.
# (Compound optindex KEYS — `a?.[i + 1]` — live in test/smallgaps.test.js:
# they are pinned in the emitter tests instead.)
f?.(1)
g?.(x, y)
r1 = obj.m?.()
v1 = a?.[k]
w1 = a?.[-1]
w2 = arr[-1]
chain = f?.(1)?.[2]?.prop
n1 = arr?.[i]?.j
u1 = @?.[k]
a?.[k] = 1
a?.b = f(2)
a?.[k] += 1
p1 = (a?.b = 1)
w1 = "#{a?.[0]}"
y1 = h a?.[k]
z1 = a?.[k] if c
t1 = obj.m?.() ? 1 : 2
